title: Create and Mechanisms
description: This modpack contains almost all Create mods
body:
**This mod pack will transform your Minecraft experience into a new and exciting one. It contains over 500+ mods, including over 400+ mods from the famous Create series, as well as popular mods such as Mekanism, Applied Energistics 2 and visual improvements from Yung. This mod pack offers players incredible opportunities for exploration, construction and automation.**

Features offered by the project:

Create mod:

Innovative mechanisms: Create complex machines, conveyors and automated systems. This allows you to automate the collection and processing of resources, freeing up time for creativity and exploration.

Customization of structures: Players can combine various mechanical elements and create unique structures, which enriches the gameplay.

Mekanism:

Energy solutions: The mod provides various ways to generate and use energy. This allows players to build efficient systems for transporting resources and creating energy, which adds strategic depth to the game.

Production Facilities: Resource processing mechanisms make the process more dynamic and interesting, allowing players to build up stockpiles and optimize their actions.

Applied Energistics 2:

Storage Systems: The ability to centrally store resources and automate their retrieval simplifies inventory management and streamlines crafting processes.

Auto-Crafting: The ability to automatically assemble items allows players to focus on exploration and construction rather than resource management, making the process more convenient.

Visual Mods by Yung:

Aesthetic Enhancements: These mods add more realistic textures, lighting, and new animations, making the world of Minecraft more picturesque and atmospheric.

Refined Biomes and Structures: Improved biomes and structure create new opportunities for exploration, add uniqueness to each region, and make the game more fun.

Impact on User Experience:

Increased Engagement: With a wide range of mechanics to choose from, players will spend more time creating and automating their systems, adding depth and variety to the gameplay.

Developing Creativity and Innovation: The large number of tools and the ability to combine them in different ways allows players to express their uniqueness and create unique structures and systems.

Social Interaction and Cooperation: Players can team up to build complex projects and technologies, which promotes the development of communities and friendships within the game.
The Creative Deep World mod pack is designed for those who want to maximize the potential of Minecraft by combining mechanics, aesthetics and creativity. Explore, build and automate, creating your own unique adventures in this limitless sandbox!
